headline: Federal Realty (FRT) Stock Trades At A Discount Despite A 37% Gain
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust has delivered a 37.4% return over the past three years, and the current checks suggest the stock still trades at a discount to estimates of intrinsic value and to market multiples. This raises the question of how much of that upside is already reflected in the price. A 37.4% three year return indicates that long term holders have already seen solid gains. Any further upside case now leans more heavily on how the current valuation stacks up against...
